readme.en:
# RAGAS

## Overview

RAGAS (Retrieval Augmented Generation Assessment) is a framework for evaluating RAG pipelines end-to-end. Rather than fixed datasets, it evaluates the quality of RAG outputs using reference-free and reference-based metrics.

## Task Description

- **Task Type**: RAG pipeline quality assessment
- **Input**: User-uploaded test set with questions, contexts, and answers
- **Output**: Per-metric scores across six evaluation dimensions
- **Evaluation**: Component-level and end-to-end metrics

## Key Features

- 6 core metrics covering generation quality, retrieval quality, and overall pipeline performance
- Reference-free metrics (answer_relevancy, faithfulness) for production use
- Reference-based metrics (answer_correctness) for benchmark comparisons
- Requires a Critic LLM for evaluation (any OpenAI-compatible model)

## Evaluation Notes

- Requires user-provided test set (questions + ground truth contexts/answers)
- Critic LLM configuration: model name, API base, API key (OpenAI-compatible)
- Embedding model required for context precision/recall metrics
- Language selection affects prompt templates

## Properties

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **Tool** | RAGAS |
| **Category** | RAG Pipeline Evaluation |
| **Metrics** | 6 core metrics |
| **Requires** | Test set + Critic LLM + Embedding model |

## Data Statistics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Core Metrics | 6 |
| Generation Metrics | answer_relevancy, faithfulness |
| Retrieval Metrics | context_precision, context_recall, context_relevancy |
| End-to-end Metrics | answer_correctness |
readme.zh:
# RAGAS

## 概述

RAGAS (Retrieval Augmented Generation Assessment) 是一个端到端 RAG 流水线评估框架。它不依赖固定数据集，而是通过无参考和有参考指标评估 RAG 输出的质量。

## 任务描述

- **任务类型**: RAG 流水线质量评估
- **输入**: 用户上传的测试集 (问题 + 上下文 + 答案)
- **输出**: 六个评估维度的指标分数
- **评测方式**: 组件级和端到端指标

## 主要特点

- 6 个核心指标覆盖生成质量、检索质量和整体流水线性能
- 无参考指标 (answer_relevancy, faithfulness) 适用于生产环境
- 有参考指标 (answer_correctness) 适用于基准对比
- 需要评判 LLM 进行评估 (任何 OpenAI 兼容模型)

## 评估说明

- 需要用户提供的测试集 (问题 + 真实上下文/答案)
- 评判 LLM 配置: 模型名称、API 地址、API Key (OpenAI 兼容)
- Embedding 模型用于 context_precision/recall 指标
- 语言选择影响提示模板

## 属性

| 属性 | 值 |
|----------|-------|
| **工具** | RAGAS |
| **类别** | RAG 流水线评估 |
| **指标数量** | 6 个核心指标 |
| **依赖** | 测试集 + 评判 LLM + Embedding 模型 |

## 数据统计

| 指标 | 值 |
|--------|-------|
| 核心指标 | 6 |
| 生成指标 | answer_relevancy, faithfulness |
| 检索指标 | context_precision, context_recall, context_relevancy |
| 端到端指标 | answer_correctness |
